stemHtml:
(For this question use annex 033-060 rev. 05.11.2004). 
The flight crew of a turbojet aeroplane prepares a flight using the following data:

Take-off mass: 210 500 kg 
Flight leg ground distance: 2500 NM 
Flight level: FL 330 
Flight regime: "Long Range" 
Tailwind component at this level: 70 kt 
Total anti-ice: "ON" 
Fixed taxi fuel: 500 kg 
Final reserve: 2400 kg 
Ignore alternate and contingency fuel.

The effects of climb and descent are not corrected for consumption. The quantity of fuel that must be loaded at the parking area is…
